summary: Smart Unclosed Date Detection + Date Picker feature fully tested. All backend APIs (8/8 tests pass) and frontend UI components verified working correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/daily-close/unclosed-days: PASSED - Returns 47 unclosed days with sales_count, expense_count for Branch 1
backend_api.Unclosed days sorted by date: PASSED - Dates returned in ascending order
backend_api.Activity counts per day: PASSED - Each day includes sales_count, expense_count, has_activity fields
backend_api.Fund transfer date parameter: PASSED - Fund wallets endpoint works, date param documented in code
backend_api.Daily log date filtering: PASSED - Returns correct data for specific date
backend_api.Invoice history by date: PASSED - Filters invoices by date correctly
backend_api.Expenses date filtering: PASSED - Filters expenses by date range

frontend_ui.UnclosedDaysBanner on Sales page: PASSED - Shows '46 unclosed days detected (2026-01-15 to 2026-03-01)'
frontend_ui.Date selector button: PASSED - Shows 'Encoding: Today' button with calendar icon
frontend_ui.Date dropdown: PASSED - Opens with 46 unclosed date options
frontend_ui.Past date selection: PASSED - Selecting 2026-01-15 updates button to 'Encoding: 2026-01-15' with amber background
frontend_ui.Past date indicator: PASSED - Shows 'All transactions will be saved to 2026-01-15. Switch to Today when done.'
frontend_ui.UnclosedDaysBanner on Expenses page: PASSED - Same banner displays on Expenses page
frontend_ui.Branch selector integration: PASSED - Banner only appears when specific branch (not All Branches) is selected

critical_code_review_comments: UnclosedDaysBanner component well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Banner correctly requires branchId prop - shows only when a specific branch is selected
Date selection properly updates header.order_date via handleEncodingDateChange callback
Backend endpoint returns comprehensive data including last_close_date, total_unclosed count
fund_transfer endpoint at line 388 accepts optional 'date' parameter via data.get()
sales.py log_date at line 345 correctly uses order_date from request instead of get_active_date()
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing Branch 1 with 46+ unclosed days
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unclosed Days Banner feature fully tested. Branch 1 (c435277f-9fc7-4d83-83e7-38be5b4423ac) has 46+ unclosed days from 2026-01-15. Banner appears on /sales-new and /expenses pages only when a specific branch is selected (not 'All Branches'). Date selection persists and shows past date indicator with amber styling.

verified_test_ids.unclosed-days-warning: Warning text showing unclosed day count and date range
verified_test_ids.unclosed-date-selector: Date selector button (shows 'Encoding: Today' or selected date)
verified_test_ids.past-date-indicator: Subtext warning when encoding for a past date
